question: List the personal details and the address type descriptions of all the students.
sql: SELECT Students.student_details, Ref_Address_Types.address_type_description FROM Students LEFT JOIN Students_Addresses ON Students.student_id = Students_Addresses.student_id LEFT JOIN Ref_Address_Types ON Students_Addresses.address_type_code = Ref_Address_Types.address_type_code

back_translation.intent: 查询学生及其关联的地址类型信息

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求列出所有学生的个人详情和地址类型描述，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、涉及的表、列均与之匹配，且无过滤、聚合、分组或排序要求。
